eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 7:36 PM on OCT 4, 2019 Effective until 5:36 AM OCT 5, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for Prescott Police Department.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  Prescott Police Department is looking for William Bonnell, a male, last seen driving a dark red 2016 Honda C R V with Arizona plate A S T 2 6 5 4. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 9 1 1.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
